test.note: All 219 tests pass. Test suite includes 15 test files covering staff-auth, notifications, slot-generation, auth-hardening, admin-auth, bookings-capacity, reassignment, reservation-idempotency, hold-expiration-email, service-requests, admin-documents, citizen-documents, audit-query, procedure-delete-audit, file-storage.

typecheck.command: bun run --filter=@tranzit/web check && cd packages/server && bunx tsc --noEmit
typecheck.note: Both web and server typecheck pass with no errors

lint.note: Biome lint passes with 0 errors on 71 files

fixFeaturesReviewed: fix-audit-ip-and-useragent (addressed in same commit as fix-audit-procedure-delete)

blockingIssuesFromPriorRound.issue: Procedure delete/remove operation does not create any audit event (VAL-AUDIT-012)
blockingIssuesFromPriorRound.resolution: Both soft delete (when service requests exist) and hard delete (when no service requests exist) now create audit_event entries with action='delete'. 5 tests added in procedure-delete-audit.test.ts.

blockingIssuesFromPriorRound.issue: ipAddress and userAgent fields are never populated in audit events (VAL-AUDIT-010)
blockingIssuesFromPriorRound.resolution: extractClientInfo() helper captures IP (x-forwarded-for or direct) and user-agent from headers. All mutation routers now pass clientInfo to createAuditEvent: bookings, citizen, procedures, reservation-series, reservations, staff, schedule routers.

assertionsCovered.VAL-AUDIT-001: covered by audit-event-instrumentation - booking create creates audit_event with action=create
assertionsCovered.VAL-AUDIT-002: covered by audit-event-instrumentation - booking confirm creates audit_event with action=confirm
assertionsCovered.VAL-AUDIT-003: covered by audit-event-instrumentation - booking cancel creates audit_event with action=cancel
assertionsCovered.VAL-AUDIT-004: covered by audit-event-instrumentation - booking reassign creates audit_event with action=reassign
assertionsCovered.VAL-AUDIT-005: covered by audit-event-instrumentation - schedule template create creates audit_event
assertionsCovered.VAL-AUDIT-006: covered by audit-event-instrumentation - calendar override create creates audit_event
assertionsCovered.VAL-AUDIT-007: covered by audit-log-query-api - entityType+entityId query uses audit_event_entity_idx
assertionsCovered.VAL-AUDIT-008: covered by audit-log-query-api - actorUserId query uses audit_event_actor_idx
assertionsCovered.VAL-AUDIT-009: covered by audit-log-query-api - dateFrom/dateTo range query works
assertionsCovered.VAL-AUDIT-010: FIXED - ipAddress and userAgent now populated via extractClientInfo() helper
assertionsCovered.VAL-AUDIT-011: covered by audit-event-instrumentation - staff profile and date override mutations create audit entries
assertionsCovered.VAL-AUDIT-012: FIXED - procedure delete (both soft and hard) now creates audit_event entries
assertionsCovered.VAL-AUDIT-013: covered by audit-event-instrumentation - reservation series and instance mutations create audit entries
assertionsCovered.VAL-AUDIT-014: covered by audit-event-instrumentation - citizen actions logged with actorType=citizen
